name: Zerodha Stock Analytics Engine
scenario: Build a stock analytics engine using HashMap patterns for O(1) lookups.

core.description: twoSum O(n), subarrayK O(n), longestConsec O(n), freq analysis
README: explains why prefixCount.put(0,1) is needed for subarrayK

ai_policy_explanation: Two sum: complement = target - nums[i]; put AFTER containsKey check. SubarrayK: prefix+HashMap; put(0,1) covers subarrays from start. LongestConsec: only start from n where n-1 not in set.
